file \mbox{\hyperlink{cstring_8h}{cstring.\+h}}

file \mbox{\hyperlink{faststack_8h}{faststack.\+h}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Implementation of a fast stack with smart memory management. \end{DoxyCompactList}\item 
file \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp_8h}{sexp.\+h}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em API for a small, fast and portable s-\/expression parser library. \end{DoxyCompactList}\item 
file \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__errors_8h}{sexp\+\_\+errors.\+h}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Error conditions are enumerated here along with any routines for translating error codes to human readable messages. \end{DoxyCompactList}\item 
file \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__memory_8h}{sexp\+\_\+memory.\+h}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Wrappers around basic memory allocation/deallocation routines to allow memory usage limiting. Only enabled if {\itshape SEXP\+\_\+\+LIMIT\+\_\+\+MEMORY} is defined when building the library, otherwise the routines are defined to be the standard malloc/calloc/realloc/free functions. \end{DoxyCompactList}\item 
file \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__ops_8h}{sexp\+\_\+ops.\+h}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em A collection of useful operations to perform on s-\/expressions. \end{DoxyCompactList}\item 
file \mbox{\hyperlink{sexp__vis_8h}{sexp\+\_\+vis.\+h}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em API for emitting graphviz data structure visualizations. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}
